title: rich herb roasted australian lamb papillote
description: tender australian lamb cooked with marsala wine and herbs in a papillote with a hint of bitterness.
instructions: season the lamb shoulder with seasoning salt and black pepper.
heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
add the lamb shoulder and sear until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
remove the lamb from the skillet and set aside.
add the sliced onion, potatoes and carrots to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are slightly tender, about 5 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
add the fresh thyme and rosemary to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
stuff the lamb shoulder with the cooked vegetables and herbs.
place the lamb in a large piece of parchment paper and drizzle with marsala wine and lemon juice.
fold the parchment paper over the lamb to create a papillote and seal the edges.
place the papillote on a baking sheet and roast in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
remove the papillote from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
